Abu Bakr went back and stayed with the Prophet ﷺ till the Prophet ﷺ took his meal and then Abu Bakr returned to his house after a long portion of the night had passed. Abu Bakr's wife said, 'What detained you from your guests (or guest)?' He said, 'Have you not served them yet?' She said, 'They refused to eat until you come. The food was served for them but they refused." `Abdur Rahman added, "I went away and hid myself (being afraid of Abu Bakr) and in the meantime he (Abu Bakr) called me, 'O Ghunthar (a harsh word)!' and also called me bad names and abused me and then said (to his family), 'Eat. No welcome for you.' Then (the supper was served). Abu Bakr took an oath that he would not eat that food. The narrator added: By Allah, whenever any one of us (myself and the guests of Suffa companions) took anything from the food, it increased from underneath. We all ate to our fill and the food was more than it was before its serving. Abu Bakr looked at it (the food) and found it as it was before serving or even more than that. He addressed his wife (saying) 'O the sister of Bani Firas! What is this?' She said, 'O the pleasure of my eyes! The food is now three times more than it was before.' Abu Bakr ate from it, and said, 'That (oath) was from Satan' meaning his oath (not to eat). Then he again took a morsel (mouthful) from it and then took the rest of it to the Prophet ﷺ. So that meal was with the Prophet ﷺ. There was a treaty between us and some people, and when the period of that treaty had elapsed the Prophet ﷺ divided us into twelve (groups) (the Prophet ﷺ's companions) each being headed by a man. Allah knows how many men were under the command of each (leader). So all of them (12 groups of men) ate of that meal
iwh_id: Dari Abu `Utsman (radhiyallahu 'anhu) meriwayatkan bahwa Abdur Rahman bin Abi Bakr berkata, “Para Sahabat Suffa adalah orang-orang miskin dan Nabi ﷺ bersabda, ‘Barangsiapa mempunyai makanan untuk dua orang, hendaknya mengambil sepertiga dari mereka (para Sahabat Suffa). `Abdur Rahman menambahkan, ayah saya dan ibu saya ada di sana (di rumah). (Sub-narator ragu apakah `Abdur Rahman juga berkata, 'Istriku dan pembantu kami yang biasa di rumahku dan rumah Abu Bakar). Abu Bakar makan malam bersama Nabi ﷺ dan tetap di sana sampai salat Isya' dipanjatkan. Abu Bakar kembali dan tinggal bersama Nabi ﷺ sampai Nabi ﷺ mengambil makanannya dan kemudian Abu Bakar kembali ke rumahnya setelah sebagian besar malam telah berlalu. Istri Abu Bakar berkata, 'Apa yang menghalangimu dari tamu (atau tamu)mu?' Dia berkata, 'Apakah kamu belum menyajikannya?' Dia berkata, 'Mereka menolak makan sampai kamu datang. Makanan disajikan untuk mereka tetapi mereka menolak." `Abdur Rahman menambahkan, "Aku pergi dan bersembunyi (karena takut pada Abu Bakar) dan sementara itu dia (Abu Bakr) memanggilku, 'Wahai Ghunthar (kata-kata kasar)!' dan juga menyebutku dengan nama buruk dan melecehkanku lalu berkata (kepada keluarganya), 'Makanlah. Tidak ada sambutan untukmu.' Kemudian (makan malam disajikan). Abu Bakar bersumpah tidak akan memakan makanan itu. Narator menambahkan: Demi Allah, setiap kali salah satu dari kami (saya dan para tamu sahabat Suffa) mengambil sesuatu dari makanan, maka bagian bawahnya bertambah. Kami semua makan sampai kenyang dan makanannya lebih banyak daripada sebelum disajikan. Abu Bakar melihatnya (makanan) dan menemukannya seperti sebelum disajikan atau bahkan lebih dari itu. Dia menyapa istrinya (berkata) 'Wahai saudara perempuan Bani Firas! Apa ini?' Dia berkata, 'Oh nikmatnya mataku! Makanannya sekarang tiga kali lebih banyak dibandingkan sebelumnya.' Abu Bakar memakannya, dan berkata, 'Itu (sumpah) dari Setan' artinya sumpahnya (tidak makan). Kemudian dia kembali mengambil sesuap (sesuap) darinya dan kemudian memberikan sisanya kepada Nabi SAW_SYMBOL. Jadi makan itu bersama Nabi SAW_SYMBOL. Ada perjanjian antara kami dan beberapa orang, dan ketika jangka waktu perjanjian itu telah berlalu Nabi ﷺ membagi kami menjadi dua belas (kelompok) (para sahabat Nabi ﷺ) yang masing-masing dipimpin oleh seorang laki-laki. Allah mengetahui berapa jumlah laki-laki yang berada di bawah komando masing-masing (pemimpin). Maka mereka semua (12 kelompok laki-laki) memakan makanan itu
